protocol: strict delayed dense-retrieval MOMENT PCA32 direct signed-utility execution with recency-bounded causal memory; frozen PCA32; cosine kNN; no score quantiles/windows; next-bar entry; hold576; 0.5x; 6bp/side; full-window CAGR; strict intratrade MDD

input.causal_context_rule: for each completed-hour anchor end, use values[:, end-context:end] only

retrieval.target_availability: row j may enter memory only when positions[j]+1+576 <= current signal position and current-position[j] <= max_age_bars when bounded
retrieval.fit_standardization: per-dimension mean/std fit on admissible 2020-2022 rows only, then L2 normalize

representation.mean_rule: causal mean over current and previous 7 anchor PCA32 states
representation.valid_rule: current plus all 8 contributing anchor PCA32 states valid
